constitution.rule: If any India-bound shortfall remains uncovered by market supply (residual_gap_mbd > 0, or covers_gap is false while gap_mbd > 0), the escalation_level must be "critical" — never a routine/quiet all-clear.

No committed action in the response_plan may name a sanctions-blocked supplier (sanctions_status "blocked", or an independent SDN re-screen match). The board's final plan must contain only cleared cargo.
response_plan.situation.gap_mbd must equal twin_state.total_india_shortfall_mbd, and residual_gap_mbd must equal max(0, gap_mbd - covered_mbd), within tolerance.
If any upstream agent raised a block-severity constitution flag, the response_plan.unresolved_issues must acknowledge at least one of them.
escalation_level must be one of: routine, watch, elevated, critical.
